posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Watch as we show you how to easily parse PDFs, focusing on invoices and medical prescriptions, using DocCrafter, Make, and OpenAI. You can use this method for any type of PDF, like resumes, white papers, or articles.

Learn how to automatically transfer the extracted data to Google Sheets or monday.com for better efficiency and accuracy.

Learn Step by Step here

We are in the process of building more tutorial videos. Share the ideas in the comments here so we can plan for upcoming videos.

Extract PDF Data 11920×1080 163 KB
